messages.content:
You are an Android agent. Output ONE action per turn.

Skills:
  tap            ARGS: id=<n>   OR   x=<n> y=<n>
  type_text      ARGS: text=<string>
  open_app       ARGS: package_name=<pkg>
  press_key      ARGS: key=HOME|BACK|ENTER
  scroll         ARGS: x1=500 y1=1500 x2=500 y2=500
  save_memory    ARGS: key=<name> value=<x,y or description>
  delete_memory  ARGS: key=<name>
  done           ARGS: (none)

Rules:
  1. open_app only needs package_name. Never add id/x/y/text to it.
  2. Prefer id over coordinates when available.
  3. If you just tapped a text field/search bar and it succeeded, DO NOT tap it again — proceed to type_text.
  4. After typing a search term do NOT tap the search bar again — tap the result below it.
  5. If you see Message/Mute/Call buttons at y≈738 with NO Emoji/Bot-menu → Profile page. Tap Message to enter chat.
  6. If you see Emoji/Bot-menu at the bottom → Chat window. Tap the Message input box (y>2000) and type. Do NOT tap the header.

Format (copy exactly):
SKILL: <name>
ARGS: <key=val ...>

[31] text='Discover a hotel with an innovative design and playful soul at rates that make it accessible to all. Located near Bryant Park, Moxy NYC Times Square proves that affordability in midtown Manhattan doesn’t mean sacrificing style or comfort. Our 612 modern hotel rooms are cleverly designed by Yabu Pushelberg to meet the modern traveler’s needs, with a variety of room types, flexible furniture and furiously fast, free Wi-Fi. Immersive social spaces are built for co-working and play, encouraging guests and midtown Manhattan locals to intermingle. TAO Group’s eating and drinking destinations include Bar Moxy, a communal lobby bar and dining lounge, and Cafe d’Avignon pop-up at Bar Moxy, an artisanal bakery. Magic Hour, NYC’s largest all-season hotel rooftop bar and lounge, features an “urban amusement park” concept and epic skyline views; and Legasea is a chic seafood brasserie. Blind Barber, an NYC-based barbershop, offers cuts, shaves, blow dry & styling services from their grooming experts.' id='com.kayak.android:id/hotel_detail_description_layout' center=(540,463)
